title: leontodon taraxacoides subsp. hispidus
intro: Leontodon taraxacoides subsp. hispidus is a subspecies of the autumn hawk's-beard plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon taraxacoides subsp. hispidus include reducing inflammation and treating wounds, as well as potential benefits for digestive health and immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a cooked green.
